g.text: Memory Map: JIT Native Instruction Buffer (Executable Segment)
Prologue: PUSH RBP; MOV RBP, RSP
Hot Loop Body: ADD RAX, RBX
Benchmark Analysis: Sum 1..1M Performance (Latency in ms)

ol.li: Dispatch Reduction: The primary speedup (90%+) is achieved by removing the switch(opcode) fetch-decode overhead.
Register Pinning: In Tier-2, loop induction variables are mapped directly to physical registers (RAX, RBX), eliminating virtual stack LDR/STR operations.
Strength Reduction: Deterministic arithmetic (e.g., x * 8) is lowered to bit-shifts (SHL x, 3) during machine code generation.
RX Policy: Memory is mapped RW during emission and toggled to RX (Read-Execute) before branch execution to satisfy security primitives.
